name: FormSubmissionProcessor
purpose: Submission processing with BOLA check and validation against published schema
ironRules: IR-1: BOLA check at ORDER 1 — submitterTenantId === form.tenantId
IR-2: Validate against published schema only (immutable version)
IR-3: Validation errors returned as success (never failure)
IR-5: Store submission before emitting events (outbox)
